title: Membership of State Banking Institutions in the Federal Reserve System; Recordkeeping and Confirmation of Certain Securities Transactions Effected by State Member Banks
abstract: The Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System is proposing amendments to Regulation H pertaining to the recordkeeping and confirmation of certain securities transactions. The amendments would accommodate developments in the securities markets by adding certain yield-related confirmation disclosure requirements for transactions involving debt and asset-backed securities effected by State member banks for customers, and providing for three day settlement of those transactions. The proposed
action: Proposed rule; request for public comments.
